message: Hi B1! Let's trade every round to maximize our profits. I'll start with a reasonable ask. Please place a solid bid so we guarantee a match today, and we can adjust our prices based on the result.
Sounds good. My value is around 60, so I can’t go very high. I’ll start with quite a low bid to test the waters; if your ask is close, we can slowly move toward a mutually profitable range.
Good start! Since your value is 60, let's trade at 45. That gives us both good margins. I will ask 45 this round. Please bid 45 so we guarantee a match and keep profiting.
45 is too high for me; my margin shrinks fast above 40. If you can ask 36–38, I can bid around 40–42 so we both profit well and keep trading every round.
